all_violations.description: Timestamp-based signatures use Date.now() across suites, which can create clock-sensitive behavior in edge CI conditions.
all_violations.suggestion: Prefer deterministic time fixtures where feasible, or centralize timestamp creation behind a helper with test-time injection.

all_violations.description: Random token generation via randomUUID() reduces strict reproducibility for failure replay.
all_violations.suggestion: Use deterministic test id helpers similar to deterministicToken(testInfo, ...) for all generated IDs.

all_violations.description: ATDD E2E signature headers depend on runtime timestamp and pseudo-signature values.
all_violations.suggestion: Switch to deterministic signed-header helper shared with automate suites when unskipping scenarios.

all_violations.description: ATDD API scenarios reuse shared story context and persistent number mappings without explicit teardown in-file.
all_violations.suggestion: Add explicit cleanup hooks or isolated seeded identifiers per test to reduce cross-run residue.
all_violations.code_snippet: const mappingResponse = await apiRequest(request, { method: 'POST', path: storyE1Context.paths.numbersCollection, ... });

all_violations.description: Ambiguity-routing scenario seeds two tenant mappings and relies on persisted state, which increases cleanup sensitivity.
all_violations.suggestion: Add teardown for seeded tenant mappings or reset fixtures per case.
all_violations.code_snippet: const firstMapping = await apiRequest(request, { ... }); const secondMapping = await apiRequest(request, { ... });

all_violations.description: File is 365 lines, exceeding maintainability target and making review/debug slower.
all_violations.suggestion: Split by behavior: signature refusal, mapping success, replay-safe dedupe, unmapped refusal.

all_violations.description: File is 510 lines with multiple concerns in one suite.
all_violations.suggestion: Split into focused suites (signature, provider fallback, public routing, ambiguity, conflict).

all_violations.description: File is 423 lines, increasing cognitive load and change risk.
all_violations.suggestion: Refactor into smaller e2e suites grouped by happy-path, replay-safe, and refusal scenarios.

all_violations.description: Signature/header and payload builder logic is duplicated across API/E2E ATDD and automate files.
all_violations.suggestion: Extract shared E1 webhook test helpers under tests/support/helpers/connectShyftWebhookTestHelpers.ts.

all_violations.description: Entire ATDD E2E suite is currently skipped, which increases drift risk over time.
all_violations.suggestion: Re-enable incrementally or quarantine with explicit TODO + gate ownership metadata.
all_violations.code_snippet: test.skip('[P0] end-to-end ingress journey accepts valid signed webhook ...')

all_violations.description: All three E2E ATDD journeys are skipped, reducing acceptance-level confidence for end-to-end ingress behavior.
all_violations.suggestion: Re-enable skipped E2E ATDD journeys and gate with deterministic signing fixture compatibility.
all_violations.code_snippet: test.skip('[P0] end-to-end ingress journey accepts valid signed webhook ...')

all_violations.description: Tests use priority tags but do not include explicit story-level test IDs required by the test-level framework convention.
all_violations.suggestion: Add explicit IDs (e.g., e.1-API-001) to improve traceability from AC to test case.
all_violations.code_snippet: test('[P0] invalid webhook signatures are refused fail-closed ... @P0', async (...) => {

all_violations.description: E2E suite validates workflow mostly through API calls; limited browser-driven interaction assertions reduce UI contract confidence.
all_violations.suggestion: Add at least one browser-centric assertion path for operator-visible outcomes where applicable.

all_violations.description: Keypair generation at module load adds small but avoidable startup cost per spec process.
all_violations.suggestion: Move shared test keys to reusable fixture setup or static deterministic fixture.

all_violations.description: Large monolithic test files increase parse and rerun overhead.
all_violations.suggestion: Split long files into focused suites to reduce rerun scope and improve CI cache locality.

high_severity_violations.description: File is 365 lines, exceeding maintainability target and making review/debug slower.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Split by behavior: signature refusal, mapping success, replay-safe dedupe, unmapped refusal.

high_severity_violations.description: File is 510 lines with multiple concerns in one suite.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Split into focused suites (signature, provider fallback, public routing, ambiguity, conflict).

high_severity_violations.description: File is 423 lines, increasing cognitive load and change risk.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Refactor into smaller e2e suites grouped by happy-path, replay-safe, and refusal scenarios.

high_severity_violations.description: Signature/header and payload builder logic is duplicated across API/E2E ATDD and automate files.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Extract shared E1 webhook test helpers under tests/support/helpers/connectShyftWebhookTestHelpers.ts.

top_10_recommendations.recommendation: Split large E1 specs into behavior-focused files under 300 lines
Extract duplicated signing/payload utilities into shared support helpers
Re-enable or consciously retire skipped ATDD E2E scenarios with ownership
Standardize on deterministic ID/time helper utilities in all E1 specs
Consolidate signature timestamp generation behind a reusable helper with injectable time source
Align ATDD E2E signing helpers with automate suites before enabling skipped tests
Introduce cleanup utilities for mapping records created in tests
Prefer unique per-test seeded entities in ATDD API file similar to automate deterministic helpers
Document fixture teardown guarantees for story-level context fixtures
Unskip E2E ATDD scenarios for AC-level end-to-end confidence
